mapper.sql: id, name, description, content, category, tags, owner_user_id, status, like_count, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO skill_manage (name, description, content, category, tags, owner_user_id, status, like_count) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{content}, #{category}, #{tags}, #{ownerUserId}, #{status}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE skill_manage SET status='DELETED', deleted_at=NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM skill_manage WHERE name = #{name} AND status <> 'DELETED'
SELECT like_count FROM skill_manage WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE skill_manage SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE skill_manage SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
